reviews.review_description: Worst game I have played.Tried to get a refund right away and it will not give me refund. Don't BUY.

developer_response.body: Sorry to hear that. This review doesn’t give enough detail for us to understand what didn’t work, Please contact on teamdivicons@gmail.com. The game is actively maintained, and specific feedback helps us identify and fix issues.

reviews.review_description: I am a disabled user, playing seated in a stationary chair. When I launch the program, I am facing a wall with a car to my left and there is no way to turn around. If I twist around in my chair, I can see a menu behind me, but there is no way to get to it. There don't seem to be any settings to change this. I don't have this issue with any other app at all. Very disappointing as I was looking forward to this.

developer_response.body: Thank you for sharing your experience with us, and we sincerely apologize for the frustration you faced. Accessibility is very important to us, and we don’t want any player to feel left out. Our team is already looking into adding seated play and orientation options so you can enjoy Racing Fever X without discomfort. You can also go to stttings and set your guardian there, it will fix your issue. Your feedback helps us improve, and we truly appreciate you bringing this to our attention.

developer_response.body: We’re sorry you ran into trouble! Racing Fever X is definitely not a scam — many players are enjoying it daily. Please reach out to support so we can help fix the issue and get you back on track. Contact us at teamdivicons@gmail.com
